verses.text: Ah, Ethiopia gunte' galkhat, puankhai gunkuangpi a omna gamte in Nail gun tawnin tui tungah laisah tawh a kibawl gunkuangpite tungah tuangin tangmi hong sawl uh hi. No a zaptel makaite aw, amau' gam gunpi in a phelkhap, a vanglian a gualzo minam, a nai a gamla-ah a kikihta mi, a tun sang mi, a cinel minamte kiangah va pai un
Leitunga teng mi khempeuh, leitunga om mi khempeuh aw, mualte tungah lim khat hong kilah ciangin en un! Peengkul hong kimut ciangin ngai un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah, “Nitaang sunga nisa silsel, anlak nisat hun sunga meiizun bangin, ka omna panin daitakin ka en ding hi,” hong ci hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah lawh hun ma deuh, leenggui a pak khit, leenggah a puamcin' laitakin, amah in singhiang heuhna temkawi tawh a selte atkhia ding a, a zam zeizai a hiangte heuhkhia ding hi
Tuate khempeuh mualtunga om vasate' nek ding leh leitunga ganhingte' nek dingin kinusia ding hi. Khuakhal ciangin vasate in ne ding a, phalbi ciangin leitunga ganhingte in ne ding uh hi

Tua hun ciangin, amau' gam gunpi in a phelkhap, a vanglian a gualzo minam, a nai a gamla-ah a kikihta mi, a tun sang mi, a cinel mite kiang panin Vanglian Topa' min omna Zion mual, Vanglian Topa' tungah letsong hong kipuak ding hi.
